models.name: OC4 + Infrastructure (small) + Disruption
models.description: State-sponsored APT (OC4) targeting regional power utilities with the goal of causing operational disruption. This scenario models sophisticated actors with nation-state resources attempting to compromise SCADA systems and industrial control infrastructure.

models.name: OC3 + SME + Ransomware
models.description: Cyber syndicate (OC3) conducting ransomware attacks against small and medium enterprises. This scenario models organized criminal groups deploying ransomware-as-a-service against targets with limited security resources.
